title: Void's Crossbow Enchant Overlay
body:
Adds little parts to a crossbow, showing it's enchantments:            

Purple - Multishot             
White - Piercing                 

![Purple - Multishot, White - Piercing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60b6e20236668576c43a3a80076d533466b2b598.png)


Feedback and support: discord - name:"silvrvr"
